title_en: Master Student · SJTU School of Medicine · AI4Rad Lab
title_cn: 硕士研究生 · 交大医学院 · AI4Rad Lab
bio_en: Master student at SJTU School of Medicine and a member of AI4Rad Lab. Research focuses on clinical radiology and medical imaging AI.
bio_cn: 交大医学院硕士研究生，AI4Rad Lab 成员。研究方向为临床放射学与医学影像人工智能。

news_en.text: HR-LLM-Stroke — a multi-agent LLM framework for emergency stroke treatment recommendation — published in Journal of Medical Internet Research (IF 8.2).

news_cn.text: HR-LLM-Stroke —— 面向急诊卒中治疗推荐的多智能体大语言模型框架，发表于 Journal of Medical Internet Research（IF 8.2）。
